# Paste-vlv v1.3.0

## Highlights

- Added drag support for moving clipboard history items into groups.
- Added group references in history so grouped items are easier to recognize and revisit.
- Improved grouped history cards with stronger visual emphasis and larger tag-style group chips.
- Fixed selected-card drag behavior and made card selection respond immediately.
- Prevented focus changes from accidentally reordering clipboard items.
- Renamed the visible packaged app to `Paste vlv` for a cleaner macOS presentation.

## Distribution

- macOS 13 or later.
- ZIP is ad-hoc signed, not Developer ID signed or notarized. macOS may show a Gatekeeper warning on first launch.
